overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The player navigates from a narrow alley onto covered walkways, crosses busy intersections, enters a street-side bar with outdoor seating and vending machines, and continues exploring the atmospheric urban environment with heavy neon signage and cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley transitioning to covered pedestrian walkway

events.description: exits narrow trash-filled alley into covered walkway with overhead protection
begins walking alongside other pedestrians in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley with trash bags then emerging into a covered walkway with neon-lit storefronts ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow tank top with blue graphic walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: cluster of blue and white garbage bags piled against the concrete wall
illuminated billboard displaying a woman's face with pink neon lighting
overhead concrete covering protecting the sidewalk from rain
wet concrete pavement reflecting the teal and pink neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow alley filled with trash bags against a concrete wall. The player emerges into a covered pedestrian walkway with wet pavement reflecting neon lights. A pedestrian in a yellow tank top walks ahead as the player moves forward under the protective overhead covering.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street sidewalk approaching major intersection

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street area with visible traffic and wider cityscape
dark van with headlights on drives past on the wet street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching a crosswalk, observing the neon-lit buildings and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: dark colored van with bright headlights driving past on the wet asphalt

entered.detail: multiple illuminated billboards and neon signs covering the building facades ahead
traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the street
elevated highway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway into an open street area with moderate pedestrian traffic. A dark van passes by on the wet street as the player approaches a crosswalk. The scene opens up to reveal towering buildings covered in neon billboards and an elevated highway structure spanning the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with overhead highway

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection
begins crossing the street while looking around at the surrounding cityscape
turns right and enters outdoor bar area with seating and neon signage

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the wet street, turning toward a street-side bar with outdoor seating

entered.detail: rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting the colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings
yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection on wet pavement
street-side bar counter with illuminated signage and protective awning
red plastic chairs arranged around metal tables on the patio

segments.scene_description: The player waits at the crosswalk as a yellow taxi passes by, then crosses the rain-slicked asphalt. The camera pans to reveal the expansive intersection under an elevated highway structure. Turning right, the player approaches a street-side bar with red plastic chairs and illuminated signage, entering the semi-covered patio area.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor street bar with vending machines and seating

events.description: rain begins falling more heavily, creating visible raindrops and wet surfaces
turns around to explore the bar interior and examine vending machines

agents.ego_description: exploring the outdoor bar area, walking past tables and examining the vending machines and bar counter

notable_agents.action: bartender wearing a mask standing behind the illuminated counter

entered.detail: neon sign reading WATSON WHORE in bright pink and blue letters
glowing green cube-shaped stools near the bar counter
illuminated vending machines displaying various products and advertisements
metal staircase leading to an upper level of the building

segments.scene_description: The player explores a street-side bar patio with red plastic chairs and glowing green cube stools. A bartender stands behind the illuminated counter as rain begins to fall more heavily. The player examines the vending machines and neon signage including a prominent WATSON WHORE sign, then turns toward a metal staircase before heading back toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with heavy neon signage and traffic

events.description: exits the bar area and returns to the open city street
crosses the street at a crosswalk with other pedestrians
rain intensifies creating a heavy downpour effect on the streets

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city streets, passing groups of pedestrians with cybernetic implants and crossing intersections in the rain

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians with colorful hair and cybernetic implants waiting at the crosswalk

entered.detail: circular pink neon sign with Japanese characters reading KIRIGIRI
red neon sign reading HOTEL on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player exits the bar and returns to the rain-soaked city streets, passing a group of pedestrians with cybernetic implants and colorful hair. The camera crosses several intersections with heavy neon signage including a prominent KIRIGIRI sign. As the rain intensifies into a downpour, the player continues walking past the HOTEL neon sign and various illuminated billboards, navigating the atmospheric cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic alleyway into the expansive, rain-drenched neon heart of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins amidst trash bags in a narrow concrete alley before emerging onto a covered pedestrian walkway where wet pavement reflects the surrounding glow. As the camera exits the shelter, the environment opens into a wide intersection dominated by towering billboards and an elevated highway, moving across rain-slicked asphalt past passing taxis and vans. The scene then shifts into the semi-covered patio of a street-side bar, weaving through red plastic chairs and glowing green stools beneath a prominent Watson Whore sign. Finally, the camera returns to the open street as the rain intensifies into a heavy downpour, passing cybernetically enhanced pedestrians and flashing Kirigiri and Hotel signs while navigating the atmospheric urban sprawl.
